tasks.description: 1.1 Extract core stat calculation logic (Total Weight, Power Output, Move Efficiency, Evasion, etc.) from `Mech.js` into a shared utility function so both engine and UI can reference it.
1.2 Update `PlayerProfile.js` to parse `parts.json` and `weapons.json` at initialization and populate the `inventory` (stash) with one of every valid item to facilitate testing.
2.1 Update `BaseScene.js` to listen for an LMB click specifically on the Hangar Console entity.
2.2 Upon click, emit an event to `UIManager` to open the `HangarScreen` and pause player movement/interactions in the BaseScene.
2.3 Create `src/ui/screens/HangarScreen.js` (extending `BaseScreen`) with a basic `mount` DOM structure containing the 2-column layout.
2.4 Create the CSS styles (`.hangar-overlay`, `.visual-pane`, `.engineering-pane`, `.stats-panel`, etc.) according to the agreed upon design.
3.1 In `HangarScreen.js`, establish a "working state" locally by deep-cloning `PlayerProfile.loadout` and `inventory`.
3.2 Implement the "Current Loadout" list rendering to show all 4 core parts and 4 weapon slots based on the working state.
3.3 Implement click listeners on these slot list items to set the "active slot filter".
3.4 Wire up the Visual Preview section on the left to display the currently equipped "working state" parts.
4.1 Based on the currently clicked loadout slot, filter the working `inventory` stash down to valid matching items (e.g., matching `partType` or Grip/Shoulder).
4.2 Render this filtered list in the "All Owned Items" panel.
4.3 Add hover listeners to the stash items; on hover, recalculate the "Projected" stat column in the Real-Time Stats panel against the working loadout.
5.1 Implement the continuous validation logic: check that all 4 core parts are equipped.
5.2 Add validation logic: check that at least 1 weapon is equipped.
5.3 Add validation logic: check that calculated Total Weight $\le$ Total Power Output.
5.4 If any constraint fails, disable the "Deploy" button and render the corresponding error message into the stat panel footer.
6.1 Implement click behavior on stash items to actually execute the swap in the working state (moving equipped part back to inventory, bringing clicked part to loadout).
6.2 Wire the "Deploy" button to overwrite `PlayerProfile` singletons with the working state and unmount the screen.
6.3 Ensure that when returning to the `BaseScene`, the player's mech is instantiated properly using the new loadout.

instruction:
All tasks are complete! This change is ready to be archived.
Consider running tests and reviewing the changes before archiving.
